final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input [15:0] d,
    output reg [15:0] q);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 16'b0;
        end else if (enable) begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= ~d;
    end
  end

endmodule
